name: Dedalus Labs
long_description:
1. Multi-model Agents SDK: build production-grade tool-calling agents in 5 lines of code using our open-source, vendor-agnostic SDK. Connect multiple models across providers (eg. Opus 4.6 + Gemini 3 Flash + GPT 5.4) within the same agent to optimize your agentic workflow's cost, latency, efficiency, and performance.

2. Agents-as-a-Service (AaaS): serve your agent or service as a hosted endpoint that anyone - including OpenClaw and Claude Code - can call.
one_liner: Connect any model(s) to any tool(s) and ship hosted agents in minutes.
